data.name: 勇者羅伊的婚禮
data.detailed_description:
作為拯救了世界的英雄，羅伊受到非常多的女孩子喜歡，而他將在一個月時間內選出一個女孩與之結婚，
國王答應為你舉辦豪華的婚禮，而你將操作羅伊，用一個月時間與喜歡的女孩約會，培養感情。
看起來一切是那麼美好，然後暗流湧動，那些喜歡你的漂亮女孩，也被其他男人虎視眈眈，
要是走錯一步，心儀的女孩就會被搶走，要潔身自好成為從一而終的純愛戰士，還是風流成性後慘遭牛頭人？全在你的抉擇之中。

Game play

  • 在遊戲中，你將有30天的行動時間。你可以透過送禮物和約會來加深你喜歡的女孩對你的愛。
  • 同時，你需要關注地圖上的NTR事件，並立即阻止，否則女孩的純結度會降低，這將影響結局
  • 在事件發生後，你將獲得該事件的DVD，有超過100+的DVD可以收集
  • 遊戲中有很多結局，請收集所有結局，所有dvd作為遊戲的目標。

Game Features [/]
  • 100+張 CG, 900+ 分差
  • 100+ 事件
  • 多結局

data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 或以上
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 或以上
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hero Roy's Wedding
data.detailed_description:
As the Hero that saved the world, Roy is the dream man of multiple girls, and he will choose one of them to marry in a month's time,
The King promised to hold a lavish wedding for you, and you will act as Roy, spending a month dating the girl you like to strengthen your bonds.
Everything seemed to be perfect, but darkness lurks underneath, those beautiful girls who like you, are also potential prey of other men.
A wrong choice could have the girl you like taken away. Are you going to be a loyal lover who keeps your promises? Or are you going to become a promiscuous lover who ends up a cuckold？It is all up to you.

Game play

  • In the game, you have 30 days to act. You can give gifts and initiate dates to increase a girl's love for you.
  • At the same time, you have to pay attention to the NTR events on the screen, and stop it immediately, or else the girl's Purity will decrease, which will affect the ending.
  • After the event, you will receive a DVD of the event, there are over 100+ DVDs available for collection.
  • There are multiple endings in the game, and your goal is to collect all the endings and all the DVDs.

Game Features [/]
  • 100+ CG, 900+ Illustrations
  • 100+ Events
  • Multiple Endings
